zh.lifeSummary: 當Joanna Ainsworth於1700年10月9日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可洛波利時，她的父親Edward Ainsworth48歲，母親Joanna Hemenway30歲。她於1719年7月1日與Ebenezer Holmes在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州文達哈姆武德斯托可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她於1700年住在美國麻薩諸塞州素福爾可洛波利。她去世於1788年2月8日在美國康乃狄克州文達哈姆武德斯托可享年87歲，埋葬在美國康乃狄克州文達哈姆武德斯托可武德斯托可 希爾 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joanna Ainsworth于1700年10月9日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可洛波利时，她的父亲Edward Ainsworth48岁，母亲Joanna Hemenway30岁。她于1719年7月1日与Ebenezer Holmes在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州文達哈姆武德斯托可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她于1700年住在美国马萨诸塞州素福爾可洛波利。她去世于1788年2月8日在美国康涅狄格州文達哈姆武德斯托可享年87岁，埋葬在美国康涅狄格州文達哈姆武德斯托可武德斯托可 希爾 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Ainsworth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from a place near Manchester named Ainsworth, from the Old English personal name Ægen + Old English worth ‘enclosure’.
English (Yorkshire): in Yorkshire the name was a variant of, or confused with   Hainsworth  .

variants.name: Hainsworth
meanings: (Yorkshire): habitational name from Hainworth in Keighley, Yorkshire, named from the Old English personal name Hagena + Old English worth ‘enclosure’. The intrusive -s- was acquired by the late 15th century, probably through false association with the Lancashire surname Ainsworth in 2 below.
variant of Ainsworth in Lancashire. Names such as de Haynesworth and de Heynesworth occur in the surrounding area in the 14th century.

nameMeanings.name: Joanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form, Io(h)anna, of Greek Iōanna, the feminine equivalent of Iōannēs ( see John ). In the New Testament, this name is borne by a woman who was one of Jesus's followers (Luke 8:3; 24:10). She was the wife of the steward of the household of King Herod Antipas. The name was regularly used throughout the Middle Ages in most parts of Europe as a feminine equivalent of John , but in England it has only been in common use as a vernacular given name since the 19th century. Celebrated British bearers of the name include the novelist Joanna Trollope ( b. 1943 ), the actress Joanna Lumley ( b. 1946 ), and the concert pianist Joanna McGregor ( b. 1959 ).

variants.name: Joannah

historicEvents.description: Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.

historicEvents.title: British Forces Capture Fort Griswold
historicEvents.description: The capture of Fort Griswold was the final act of treason that Benedict Arnold committed. This would be a British victory. On the American side 85 were killed, 35 wounded and paroled, 28 taken prisoner, 13 escaped, and 1 twelve year old was captured and released.
historicEvents.urlTitle: History of the Battle of Groton and The Burning of New London

en.lifeSummary: When Joanna Ainsworth was born on 9 October 1700, in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, her father, Edward Ainsworth, was 48 and her mother, Joanna Hemenway, was 30. She married Ebenezer Holmes on 1 July 1719, in Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She lived in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts, United States in 1700. She died on 8 February 1788, in Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut, United States, at the age of 87, and was buried in Woodstock Hill Cemetery, Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joanna Ainsworth est née le 9 octobre 1700, à Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Edward Ainsworth, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Joanna Hemenway, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Ebenezer Holmes le 1 juillet 1719, à Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle a vécu à Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts, États-Unis en 1700. Elle est décédée le 8 février 1788, à Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut, États-Unis, à l’âge de 87 ans, et a été enterrée à Woodstock Hill Cemetery, Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joanna Ainsworth am 9. Oktober 1700 in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Edward Ainsworth 48 und ihre Mutter Joanna Hemenway 30. Sie hat am 1. Juli 1719 in Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America Ebenezer Holmes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. 1700 hat sie in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Sie starb am 8. Februar 1788 im Alter von 87 Jahren in Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Woodstock Hill Cemetery, Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joanna Ainsworth è nata il il 9 ottobre 1700 nel Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, Edward Ainsworth, aveva 48 anni e sua madre, Joanna Hemenway, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Ebenezer Holmes il 1 luglio 1719, nel Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Vissuto a Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1700. Morì il 8 febbraio 1788, nel Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 87 anni, e fu sepolta a Woodstock Hill Cemetery, Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.Woodstock, Windham, CT: アメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ウィンドハムウッドストック
ja.Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts, United: アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州スフォルクロクスブリー
ja.lifeSummary: Joanna Ainsworthが1700年10月9日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクロクスブリーで生まれた時，父Edward Ainsworthは48歳，母Joanna Hemenwayは30歳であった。1719年7月1日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ウィンドハムウッドストックでEbenezer Holmesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1700年にはアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州スフォルクロクスブリーに住んでいた。彼女は1788年2月8日にアメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ウィンドハムウッドストックで87歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ウィンドハムウッドストックウッドストック ヒル セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut Colony,: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 윈드함 우드스톡
ko.Woodstock Hill Cemetery, Woodstock, Wind: 미국 코네티컷 주 윈드함 우드스톡 우드스톡 힐 세멧리
ko.Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay, Bri: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 록스버이
ko.Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut, British: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 윈드함 우드스톡
ko.lifeSummary: Joanna Ainsworth(이)가 1700년 10월 9일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 록스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edward Ainsworth(은)는 48세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joanna Hemenway(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1719년 7월 1일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 윈드함 우드스톡에서 Ebenezer Holmes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 1700년도에 미국 매사추세츠 주 수폴크 록스버이에서 살았다. 그녀는 1788년 2월 8일 미국 코네티컷 주 윈드함 우드스톡에서 87세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 코네티컷 주 윈드함 우드스톡 우드스톡 힐 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joanna Ainsworth nasceu em 9 de outubro de 1700, em Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Edward Ainsworth, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Joanna Hemenway, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Ebenezer Holmes em 1 de julho de 1719, em Woodstock, Windham, Conecticute, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela viveu em Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América em 1700. Ela faleceu em 8 de fevereiro de 1788, em Woodstock, Windham, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América, com 87 anos, e foi sepultada em Woodstock Hill Cemetery, Woodstock, Windham, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut, British: вудстокк, виндхам, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joanna Ainsworth родилась 9 октября 1700 г. в местности роксбури, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Edward Ainsworth было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Joanna Hemenway, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ebenezer Holmes 1 июля 1719 г. в местности вудстокк, виндхам, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она жила в местности роксбури, суффолк, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты в 1700 году. Она умерла 8 февраля 1788 г. в местности вудстокк, виндхам, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 87 лет и была похоронена в местности вудстокк хилл кеметири, вудстокк, виндхам, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joanna Ainsworth nació el 9 de octubre de 1700, en Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Edward Ainsworth, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Joanna Hemenway, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Ebenezer Holmes el 1 de julio de 1719, en Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Vivió en Roxbury, Suffolk, Masachusets, Estados Unidos en 1700. Murió el 8 de febrero de 1788, en Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 87 años, y fue sepultada en Woodstock Hill Cemetery, Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut, Estados Unidos.
